name: Do I need a big website to show up in ChatGPT answers?
description: No, but you do need clear service pages, a strong homepage, and enough detail for AI to understand you.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a big website to show up in ChatGPT answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: You do not need a huge content library to begin, but you do need enough detail for AI to understand what you do and who you help. A strong homepage, a few service pages, and a short FAQ can be enough to start testing visibility.
acceptedAnswer.description: No, but you do need clear service pages, a strong homepage, and enough detail for AI to understand you.
